measures.name: Avg Guests
measures.comment: Average number of guests per booking

measures.name: Cancellation Rate
measures.comment: Percentage of bookings that were cancelled

measures.name: Avg Nightly Rate
measures.comment: Average nightly rate across all bookings

measures.name: Active Hosts
measures.expr:
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
  WHEN properties.hosts.is_active THEN properties.host_id
END)

measures.name: Verified Hosts
measures.expr:
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
  WHEN properties.hosts.is_verified THEN properties.host_id
END)

measures.name: Pct Verified Hosts
measures.comment: Percentage of hosts that are verified

measures.name: Average Length of Stay
measures.comment: Average number of nights per booking

measures.name: Booking Completion Pct
measures.comment: Percentage of bookings that were completed

dimensions.name: Booking Status
dimensions.comment: Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled)

dimensions.name: Base Price
dimensions.comment: Base price of the property per night

dimensions.name: Bedrooms
dimensions.comment: Number of bedrooms in the property

dimensions.name: State or Province
dimensions.comment: State or province of the destination

queryLines:

      ('Boutique Hotel', 45.443, 9.198, 'Vigentino Heritage Hotel', 'Carlo Amato', 'Lakes', 8) AS t(
      property_type, latitude, longitude, property_name, host_name, region, bookings
    )
)
SELECT
  property_type,
  CAST(latitude AS DOUBLE) AS latitude,
  CAST(longitude AS DOUBLE) AS longitude,
  property_name,
  host_name,
  region
FROM
  properties
  LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(SEQUENCE(1, bookings)) t AS n

lines: ## **Executive Overview** A real-time view of booking performance, revenue trends, and property activity across your portfolio. Designed to help operations and revenue teams spot shifts in demand and act quickly.

frame.title: Distribution of base prices by property types

lines: ## **Insights breakdown** Wanderbricks' booking trends dashboard gives teams a clear view of demand patterns across time, destinations, and property types. It covers everything from high-level KPIs and seasonal peaks to booking lead times and cancellation reasons.

frame.title: Correlating host ratings to average nightly rate
Average base price across property types and bedrooms

lines: ## **Tables** Tabular representations of wanderbricks data for detailed logs

frame.title: Host Country
